category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a language agnostic test suite for TOML parsers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as toml-test.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface provided.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/toml-lang/toml-test, so repo is null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a TOML parser test suite; source_facts.executables lists toml-test.
